quizzes.q: A system is Confidentiality=Moderate, Integrity=Low, Availability=High. Its category is?
quizzes.why: Categorization takes the high-water mark — the highest of the three objectives — so it is High.

quizzes.q: Which standard defines the Low / Moderate / High impact levels?
quizzes.why: FIPS 199 defines the Low, Moderate, and High impact levels.
